## Type

- [ ] feat: new feature
- [ ] fix: bug fix
- [ ] refactor: code restructuring
- [ ] docs: documentation
- [ ] chore: maintenance
- [ ] ci: CI/CD changes

## Checklist

- [ ] Build succeeds (`npm run build`)
- [ ] No type errors (`npx tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] README updated (if user-facing changes)
- [ ] Plugin manifest version bumped (if applicable)
